name: Strawberry Crunch Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Plus cake mix (white or yellow)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9 pan.
3. Combine the cake mix, margarine, and oats in a bowl until crumbly.
4. Reserve 1 cup crumbs for topping. Mix the remaining crumbs with the egg until well combined. Press into the prepared pan.
5. Pour the strawberry filling over the crust and spread evenly on top.
6. To the reserved crumbs, add the remaining oats, margarine, pecans, and brown sugar. Beat until thoroughly mixed.
7. Sprinkle over the strawberry mixture.
8. Dot with a small amount of melted margarine.
9. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes at 350°F.
10. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
